items: Refreshed and published GitHub Pages status snapshots via `cheesebot-status/publish_status.sh`.
Updated `cheesebot-status/status.json` and wrote snapshot data for injury reports, NBA daily games, stocks, weather, email guardrails, and self-audit.
Pushed the status snapshot update to `realcheesebot/cheesebot-status` (`386358d`).
Investigated the missing durable activity log issue after Jon asked why no entries were available.
Confirmed the existing durable log location is `memory/activity/YYYY-MM-DD.md` and that 2026-03-23 only contained a note saying no entries were available.
Backfilled today’s log from verifiable records in the current session transcript and local memory/log files.
Durable daily activity logs live at `memory/activity/YYYY-MM-DD.md`.
End-of-day summaries should read from this file, and notable completed work should be appended here during the day rather than reconstructed from memory later.
